creator: corbesero@fast.net
text: Stephen Corbesero has over 20 years of software and hardware computing experience in various flavors of Unix (FreeBSD since 2.2, SunOS, Solaris, ...), C and C++, Perl, databases, networking, etc. I can provide system and network configuration and administration, some custom programming in the above languages, and troubleshooting and repair. I am located in Eastern Pennsylvania. Please email me corbesero at fast dot net for more information.
